title: Bannidge Holt

'''Bannidge Holt''' was a member of a prestigious [[Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Holt family|family]] and an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Earning the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] at a young age, Holt served in [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen's]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] during the [[Listehol Campaign]] of [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], helping to stop [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] raids on [[Merchant/Legends|shipping]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] and along nearby [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]].

Hailed as a hero and promoted to admiral, Holt joined [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] [[Western Reaches Operation]] of [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], jointly [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding]] the [[Western Reaches Superiority Force]] with Admiral [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Terrinald Screed]]. Holt was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the campaign when the admiral and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Hurst Romodi/Legends|Hurst Romodi]] were [[Ambush at Bryndar|ambushed]] by [[Iska pirates/Legends|Iska pirates]] at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bryndar]].

==Biography==
===Hero of the Listehol Campaign===
[[File:Anaxes.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The prestigious Holt family maintained a strong naval tradition on the fortress world Anaxes.]]
Bannidge Holt was a member of the [[Holt family]],<ref name="EGW" /> a prestigious household that hailed from the [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]] [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]], in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], and had a long history of [[Navy/Legends|naval]] service. Following in the family's tradition,<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> Holt entered military service and, by [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]],<ref name="EGW" /> which formed after the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was [[Declaration of a New Order|reorganized]] into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] following its victory over the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] the [[19 BBY/Legends|previous year]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

Shortly after its founding, the Empire set about eliminating [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist holdouts]], [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Slaver/Legends|slavers]], and criminal gangs operating in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. In 18 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], Holt was assigned as one of the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanders]] in [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen's]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], [[Listehol Campaign|tasked]] with putting an end to shipping raids in the newly-formed [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] and along the nearby [[Listehol Run/Legends|Listehol Run]] and [[Shaltin Tunnels/Legends|Shaltin Tunnels]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] by an alliance of [[Sikurdian/Legends|Sikurdian]] pirates, [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] slavers, and [[Tervig]] slavers. The Imperial fleet was largely composed on [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class heavy cruisers]] intended for use by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], but Yularen and Holt boosted the fleet's strength with a small number of [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]] capable of carrying [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]].<ref name="EGW" />

The Imperials defeated Sikurdian forces at the [[Battle of Sagma]] and [[Siege of Zygerria|blockaded]] [[Zygerria/Legends|Zygerria]],<ref name="EGW" /> the Zygerrian [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]],<ref name="GaW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref> forcing the Zygerrians into a negotiated peace. The Empire also launched a [[Raids on Tervissis|series of raids]] against [[Tervissis]],<ref name="EGW" /> the home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the Tervig slavers.<ref name="CSWE-Tervissis">{{CSWECite|III|233|Tervissis}}</ref> Although Tervissis withstood the Imperial assault until [[13 BBY/Legends|13 BBY]], Holt was hailed as a war hero for the actions in the Listehol Campaign and was promoted to admiral.<ref name="EGW" />

===Western Reaches Operation===
[[File:Rebellion_Screed.png|thumb|right|240px|Holt shared joint command of the Western Reaches Superiority Force with Admiral Terrinald Screed.]]
As the Clone Wars neared its end, the remnants of Confederate [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous's]] [[Confederacy military|forces]] had sought shelter among the pirate and slaver bases in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]]. In [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] gave responsibility for bringing order to the Western Reaches to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]. With no significant [[Planetary Security Forces]] operating in the area, Tarkin requested significant [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] resources for the [[Western Reaches Operation]], including numerous veterans of previous campaigns in the Rim. Holt was given joint command of the [[Western Reaches Superiority Force]] with Admiral [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Terrinald Screed]], a hero of the [[Ciutric Offensive]] earlier that year.<ref name="EGW" />

The Imperial forces had seen action in several battles when [[Iska pirates/Legends|Iska pirates]] impersonating local officials [[Ambush at Bryndar|ambushed]] Holt and General [[Hurst Romodi/Legends|Hurst Romodi]], commander of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial ground forces]], at [[Bryndar]],<ref name="EGW" /> a planet in the [[Dalicron sector/Legends|Dalicron sector]].<ref name="TEA">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Bryndar system/Legends|Bryndar system]]</ref> Holt was [[Death/Legends|killed]] and Romodi badly injured and left blind by a [[Fragmentation grenade/Legends|fragmentation grenade]].<ref name="EGW" />

With the aid of [[Holodrama/Legends|holodrama]] adaptations of their actions, the central participants in the Western Reaches Operation had become famous throughout the Empire. As such, news of Holt's death was met with shock by Imperial citizens, many of whom would always remember where they were when they learned the admiral had been killed. Despite the loss of Holt, the campaign was ultimately successful, with the Empire winning a [[Battle of Ogoth Tiir/Legends|decisive victory]] at [[Ogoth Tiir]].<ref name="EGW" />

==Personality and traits==
A member of the Holt family,<ref name="EGW" /> Bannidge Holt continued the family's tradition of naval service<ref name="CatCW" /> by serving in the Imperial Navy. Holt proved to be a capable [[Officer/Legends|officer]], earning the rank of captain at a young age and subsequently being promoted to admiral. Holt was hailed as a war hero for the Listehol Campaign, and [[Media/Legends|media]] coverage of the Western Reaches Operation further enhanced Holt's fame.<ref name="EGW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bannidge Holt was created for ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'',<ref name="Endnotes">{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/23039847571/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-7|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 7}}</ref> a [[2012]] reference book written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Paul R. Urquhart]].<ref name="EGW" /> Although a new character, Holt was introduced as a reference to the Holt family, which had been first mentioned<ref name="Endnotes" /> in the form of [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Holt (Fleet Admiral)|Holt]] in the [[1989]] ''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'', a supplement for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="IS">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> The [[2003]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' further established the Holts as a prestigious naval family.<ref name="CatCW" />

''Coruscant and the Core Worlds'' describes the Holt family as residents of the planet Anaxes,<ref name="CatCW" /> but Holt's own homeworld is not confirmed in ''The Essential Guide to Warfare''.<ref name="EGW" /> In the endnotes to the latter book, Fry referred to Holt using "he/him" pronouns.<ref name="Endnotes" />
